name: Hearty Beef and Rice
recipeIngredient: 4 oz Cheddar or American cheese, shredded
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook beef and onion in a large skillet over medium-high heat until the beef is browned; drain excess fat.
2. Stir in rice, soup, tomatoes, corn, garlic powder, and chili powder. Transfer the mixture to a greased 2-quart baking dish.
3. Bake at 350°F for 20 minutes.
4. Top with cheese and bake an additional 5 to 10 minutes.
Each serving provides:
414 calories
22 g. protein
21 g. fat
34 g. carbohydrate
2 g. dietary fiber
65 mg. cholesterol
665 mg. sodium
Source: Stretching Your Budget With Rice
Reprinted with permission from The USA Rice Council
Electronic format courtesy of Karen Mintzias
